specific_question: What is the best-selling vehicle model of Elexion Automotive in 2024?
answer: The Elexion 'NEXUS' SUV is the best-selling vehicle model of the company. It constituted 58% of all the vehicles sold in the North American market in 2024.
dr_question: By the end of 2025, how can Elexion Automotive use data generated through its customer relationship management system to analyze customer behavior online and identify patterns that drive sales?
